Sustainability utilities module.

class core.sustainability.utils.EnergyConverter[source]

Bases: object

Energy unit conversions.

JOULES_PER_KWH = 3600000

Bases: object

Global Warming Potential calculations.

DEFAULT_GWP = {'CH4': {'100_year': 28, '20_year': 81}}
methane_to_co2e(methane_kg: float, year: int = 100) → float[source]
class core.sustainability.utils.GridFactorManager(config_loader)[source]

Bases: object

Manages grid intensity factors by reading from config file.

WORLD_AVERAGES = {'carbon': 0.475, 'methane': 0.18, 'water': 2.0}
get_factors(country_code: str = 'US') → GridFactors[source]

Get grid factors for a country.

list_countries() → list[source]

Get list of available countries.
